{{Infobox character
| name = Gunder
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gunder]] is a man who works on maintenance robots.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gunder]] is not a mage or a student of the [[Magic Tower]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gunder]] possesses a plasma pistol.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gunder]] is a man who is not a magic guy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Not a magic guy myself, but I got the sense they wanted anything they could grab.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
